summary: Iter 115: Comprehensive QA of Resources, Categories, Override Codes, References, Email Templates, Scope Unlock (E1-E5), Enquiry Flow (G1-G4), and Cross-Tenant Security. All 53 backend tests passed. Two critical bugs found and FIXED. Scope unlock flow (E2/E3) now fully working. Email delivery is MOCKED.

minor.issue: Audit log entries use 'action' field (e.g., USER_LOGIN), not 'event_type'. The backend test for resource audit used /api/resources/{id}/logs which works, but article_created/updated/deleted events should be verified to be present.

ui_bugs.issue: Cart shows 'No purchasable items in cart' even when scope-based items are in the cart (they appear in separate Scope-Based Items section). This may confuse users.

issues: Scope ID input in Cart (inside Scope-Based Items section) is missing data-testid attribute. The input placeholder is 'Enter Scope ID (e.g., SCOPE-ABC123)' but has no testid for automated testing.

bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.bug: CRITICAL: Public endpoint list_references_public used undefined 'admin' variable in 'enrich_partner_codes(refs, is_platform_admin(admin))'. This would cause NameError on GET /api/references.
bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.fix: Removed the incorrect enrich_partner_codes call from the public endpoint

bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.bug: CRITICAL (E2 broken): handleValidateScopeId called api.get('/articles/${scopeId}/validate-scope') which does NOT exist — returns 404 always. The endpoint is /resources/{id}/validate-scope.

test_results.A1_resource_categories_crud: PASS — create, read, update, delete all work; required fields validated; duplicate rejected
test_results.B1_resource_create_validation: PASS — Scope Final Won/Lost requires price; missing title returns 400/422
test_results.B2_resource_edit: PASS — content and price updates work
test_results.B4_resource_list_filters: PASS — category filter, search, pagination all work
test_results.C1_email_templates_list: PASS — all templates present including enquiry_customer and scope_request_admin
test_results.D1_override_codes_crud: PASS — create, list, filter by status all work
test_results.D2_override_code_expiry: PASS — expired codes detected in expired filter
test_results.E1_scope_resource_create: PASS — Scope Final Won with price created successfully
test_results.E2_scope_validate_valid: PASS (after fix) — valid scope ID returns title+price; button changes to 'Add to cart — $2500'
test_results.E3_scope_validate_invalid: PASS — invalid/non-scope ID returns 'Invalid Scope Id'
test_results.E4_scope_add_to_cart: PASS — scope-unlocked product added to cart, navigated to cart page
test_results.E5_scope_cart_validation: PASS — Cart shows Scope-Based Items section with its own scope ID validation
test_results.F1_references_crud: PASS — create, update, delete all work; duplicate key rejected
test_results.G2_enquiries_admin_tab: PASS — lists 2 records with status filter, date filter, View/Delete
test_results.G3_enquiry_emails: PASS (MOCKED) — email_outbox has enquiry_customer and scope_request_admin entries with status=mocked
test_results.SEC1_cross_tenant_resources: PASS — admin resource list is tenant-filtered
test_results.SEC2_cross_tenant_scope: PASS — fake cross-tenant scope ID returns 404

action_items: MINOR: Add data-testid to Cart scope ID input (in Scope-Based Items section of Cart.tsx)
MINOR: Consider showing a message like 'Cart total excludes scope-based items' instead of 'No purchasable items in cart' to reduce confusion

MINOR: Verify article_created/updated/deleted audit log events are being written to audit_logs (backend test for B5 uses /api/resources/{id}/logs which is a different endpoint than /api/admin/audit-logs)
critical_code_review_comments: references.py public endpoint bug (NameError on admin variable) — FIXED in this iteration
ProductDetail.tsx used wrong API path /articles/ instead of /resources/ for validate-scope — FIXED in this iteration
Both Cart.tsx and ProductDetail.tsx now consistently use /resources/{id}/validate-scope ✅
Email templates endpoint returns 11 templates; both enquiry_customer and scope_request_admin are enabled ✅
Override codes have correct expiry detection and status filters ✅
validate-scope correctly enforces: resource exists, tenant matches, category in SCOPE_FINAL_CATEGORIES, price set ✅
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/admin/references.py (removed undefined admin variable from public endpoint)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical flows pass; minor UX note on cart messaging)

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted: TEST_Scope_Final_Won_Iter115 resource, TEST_Override_ITER115 code, TEST_Reference_Iter115, TEST_Resource_Help_Iter115, TEST_Category_Iter115, UI Test Scope Final Won Iter115. All cleaned up.
mocked_apis: Email delivery is MOCKED — email_outbox collection has enquiry_customer and scope_request_admin entries with status=mocked. No actual emails sent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 115 fixed 2 critical bugs: (1) references.py NameError, (2) ProductDetail.tsx /articles/ wrong path for validate-scope. All 53 backend tests pass. Scope unlock flow E1-E5 fully working after the fix. Email templates: 11 templates exist including enquiry_customer and scope_request_admin (MOCKED). Enquiries tab shows scope_pending records. Override Codes sub-tab shows active/inactive/expired codes. Resource Categories sub-tab shows 0 custom categories. Cart shows Scope-Based Items section separately from purchasable items.

issue_1_references_nameerror.root_cause: references.py list_references_public function called enrich_partner_codes(refs, is_platform_admin(admin)) where admin is not a parameter of the function. The admin variable is available in authenticated admin routes but not in this unauthenticated public endpoint.
issue_1_references_nameerror.reproduction: GET /api/references without auth token → NameError: name 'admin' is not defined
issue_1_references_nameerror.fix: Removed the enrich_partner_codes call from the public endpoint since it doesn't need partner code enrichment

issue_2_scope_validate_wrong_path.root_cause: When Articles was renamed to Resources, the validate-scope endpoint path was updated in the backend (/resources/{id}/validate-scope) but ProductDetail.tsx was not updated and still called /articles/{id}/validate-scope. The /articles/ path doesn't exist, so every validate-scope call returned 404.
issue_2_scope_validate_wrong_path.reproduction: Navigate to product page with Scope ID field → enter any valid Scope Final Won resource ID → shows 'Invalid Scope Id' error
